final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear, centered focal element
Subject: must include visual references to three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle goods — balanced and harmonious as a unified icon
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, positive, energetic atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a contemporary, cross-culturally neutral direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and free of symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative connotations in any major culture or religion; must read clearly at small avatar sizes
Avoid: must avoid flags, political symbols, religious iconography, culturally sensitive color combinations, human faces or figures that could imply ethnicity or identity bias
